data.content: I need to fix two issues: MSTest 3.6.3 doesn't have `ThrowsExactly` (needs 3.7+), and implicit usings aren't enabled. Let me upgrade MSTest and add the missing using.

arguments.old_str:
<PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.11.1" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestAdapter" Version="3.6.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestFramework" Version="3.6.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
arguments.new_str:
<PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.11.1" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestAdapter" Version="3.8.2" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestFramework" Version="3.8.2" />
  </ItemGroup>

data.reasoningText:
Two issues:
1. `Assert.ThrowsExactly` requires MSTest v3.7+ (it was introduced in MSTest 3.7). The project uses 3.6.3.
2. The `ArgumentOutOfRangeException` and other `System` types aren't found because there's no `using System;` and no implicit usings enabled.

Let me check if `ImplicitUsings` is enabled in the project file. Looking at it again - it doesn't have `<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>`. So I need to add `using System;` to the test file.


I need to upgrade MSTest to at least version 3.7.0 or later to support `ThrowsExactly`. Let me bump it to a recent version like 3.8.2.

<PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.11.1" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestAdapter" Version="3.6.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestFramework" Version="3.6.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
arguments.new_str:

    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>

  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>

    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestAdapter" Version="3.8.2" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestFramework" Version="3.8.2" />
  </ItemGroup>

data.content:
All 5 tests pass. Here's a summary of the modernizations applied:

**Changes made:**

| Anti-pattern | Fix |
|---|---|
| Non-sealed test class | Made class `sealed` |
| Nullable `TestContext?` | Changed to `TestContext = null!` |
| `[TestInitialize]` for simple setup | Inline field initialization |
| Vague test name `Test1` | Descriptive `Method_Scenario_Expected` naming |
| Swapped `Assert.AreEqual` args | Fixed to `(expected, actual)` order |
| `[ExpectedException]` attribute | Replaced with `Assert.ThrowsExactly<T>()` |
| Hard cast + `Assert.IsTrue` | Used `Assert.IsInstanceOfType<T>()` + exact assertion |
| Manual data-driven loop | Replaced with `[DataRow]` attributes |
| MSTest 3.6.3 | Upgraded to 3.8.2 (required for `ThrowsExactly`) |
| Missing `ImplicitUsings` | Enabled in project |
